html:
Exclusive to:

The Gold Pan is an item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Treasure Hunting Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and 2 Iron Ores and a Hammer to craft.

It is used on Sparkling Pools to get Gold Dust.

Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Gold Pan
"Pans gold actually."
×2 ×1
Tab
Tier
Equipable
27.2
(20.4 )
(34 )
(13.6-54.4 )
30 uses
Does not stack
Perk
Collects Gold Dust from Sparkling Pools.
"goldpan"
“Critcs panned it.”
–Wilson
“You mean I have to do work?”
–Willow
“Is for eating from?”
–Wolfgang
“Offers too much hope.”
–Wendy
“GOLD GATHERING ACCESSORY”
–WX-78
“This should be useful for finding useful minerals.”
–Wickerbottom
“Haven't done any prospectin' in a while.”
–Woodie
“Must I do everything myself?”
–Maxwell
“I do hope the holes were meant to be there.”
–Wagstaff
“It shall vanquish the pieces öf tiny göld!”
–Wigfrid
“Hey, now we can be prospectors.”
–Webber
“You mean I gotta work for my gold?”
–Walani
“I have better pans.”
–Warly
“Fer fishin' fer gold.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS A PAN FOR GLITTERIES”
–Wilba
“Gets Shiny from puddle”
–Wormwood
“Swell. A pan with holes in it.”
–Wheeler
The Gold Pan is an item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Treasure Hunting Tab, requires a Science Machine to prototype, and 2 Iron Ores and a Hammer to craft.
It is used on Sparkling Pools to get Gold Dust.

The '''Gold Pan''' is an item exclusive to the ''[[Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Treasure Hunting Tab]], requires a [[Science Machine]] to prototype, and 2 [[Iron Ore]]s and a [[Hammer]] to craft.

It is used on [[Sparkling Pool]]s to get [[Gold Dust]].
